scores.correctness_notes: All three required sections (services, checks, log-targets) are correctly structured with proper fields. on-check-failure linking is correct, environment variables are properly formatted, log target uses correct Loki format.
scores.hallucination_notes: on-success and on-failure are not valid Pebble service fields in the layer spec (Pebble uses on-check-failure, not generic on-success/on-failure lifecycle hooks in YAML layers). backoff-delay, backoff-factor, backoff-limit may not be valid layer YAML fields — these are not documented in the gold standard layer specification.
